recommendations.title: Kevin Hart: I'm a Grown Little Man
recommendations.overview: Fresh off the heels of appearing in movies like Superhero Movie and The 40 Year-Old Virgin, fast-talking comedian Kevin Hart stars in this live stand-up performance where he makes fun of everything and everybody - especially himself.

recommendations.title: Louis C.K.: Chewed Up
recommendations.overview: Profane, vulgar and obscenely funny, Louis C.K. insists on telling the truth, whether you like it or not! Join the Emmy Award-winning stand-up comic and TV star (Lucky Louie) as he shares his thoughts on the stuff everyone thinks about -- male bodily

recommendations.title: Kevin Hart: Seriously Funny
recommendations.overview: Fresh off the heels of appearing in movies like Superhero Movie and The 40 Year-Old Virgin, fast-talking comedian Kevin Hart stars in his second live stand-up performance in Cleveland, Ohio, where he makes fun of everything and everybody - especially

recommendations.title: Jim Jefferies: Bare
recommendations.overview: Smart, crude, and in-your-face, Australian comic/actor/equal-opportunity-offender Jim Jefferies is not for the faint of heart. Whether he is lampooning gun control, auditioning disabled actors, or over-sharing sexual experiences, the FXX "Legit" star

recommendations.title: Ed Wood
recommendations.overview: The mostly true story of the legendary "worst director of all time", who, with the help of his strange friends, filmed countless B-movies without ever becoming famous or successful.

recommendations.title: Everything's Gonna Be Great
recommendations.overview: When Altan swipes prescription drugs from his brother Nuri's pharmacy, they soon find themselves on a dangerous but funny road trip to get rid of the stuff and escape the mafiosi Altan tried to double-cross. Along the way, the brother who are compete

recommendations.title: Broadway Danny Rose
recommendations.overview: A hapless talent manager named Danny Rose, by helping a client, gets dragged into a love triangle involving the mob. His story is told in flashback, an anecdote shared amongst a group of comedians over lunch at New York's Carnegie Deli. Rose's one-ma

recommendations.title: All About Me
recommendations.overview: Dramatised origin story of one of Germany's most beloved contemporary comedians, Hape Kerkeling.

recommendations.title: Pee Mak
recommendations.overview: Mak's friends just want to protect him, but his wife Nak won't let a small thing like her own death get in the way of true love.

recommendations.title: Kathleen Madigan: Madigan Again
recommendations.overview: Kathleen Madigan drops in on Detroit to deliver material derived from time spent with her Irish Catholic Midwest family, eating random pills out of her mother's purse, touring Afghanistan, and her love of John Denver and the Lunesta butterfly.
